'''H-3POC''' belonged to the group of [[Color/Legends|jade-colored]] [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droids]] operated by [[Vago Gejalli Thokka|Vago the Hutt]], as assistants used in his services to [[Popara Anjiliac Diresto|Popara the Hutt]].
